markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Close ED-WB-012 (DEC-007 reverses descope): source control panel over the LOCAL git repo - status (staged/unstaged/untracked), per-file diff view (reuses MT-247 diff), stage/unstage/discard (discard requires explicit confirm; never silent), commit with message, branch list/switch/create, log view, line blame in code context. Backend: thin git CLI invocation layer in handshake_core with typed results + receipts (git is a local tool dependency, not an external service). ALSO surface the Handshake-native history: EventLedger/CRDT document history side-by-side so the operator sees both authority models honestly.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.
Bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries only (Tiptap/Monaco precedent); no CDN; no external app launches as product behavior.
PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; UI artifacts are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle (v02.193), product code, tests, and receipts.

OPERATOR ORDER (DEC-007, 2026-06-12): NO scaffolding, templates, mock-ups, or vibecoding; every feature must be working AND tested in runtime (executed vitest/Playwright/real-PG proof per feature, not status text). A feature without an executed runtime proof is NOT done.
Git ops via local git CLI with typed parsing; destructive ops (discard/reset) demand explicit per-invocation confirm; no force flags ever by default.
Receipts for write ops in EventLedger.
scope.expected_behavior: Operator stages, commits, branches, diffs, and blames from inside Handshake; document history (ledger) visible alongside.
acceptance_criteria: status/diff/stage/commit/branch/log/blame each runtime-proven against a real temp git repo (Playwright + backend tests).
Discard demands confirm; cancel leaves tree untouched (negative test).
Commit appears in git log with correct message (proven).
Adversarial self-review recorded per the WP loop; findings fixed before evidence write.
verification: cargo test -p handshake_core --features runtime-full,test-utils (scoped) green with real-PG tests for backend state.
pnpm vitest run green; tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean.
Offline Playwright runtime proof for each named capability (zero external network requests).
handoff_requirements: List files changed, tests run with exact names/counts, commits.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence and Playwright artifacts produced.
List remaining risks and any honestly-documented deviations (e.g., prose multi-cursor approach).

evidence: runtime proof: real-PG source-control receipt test PASS (113.84s) against a real temp git repo + real PG-backed KernelSourceControlEventRecorder (stage+commit append SOURCE_CONTROL_OPERATION_RECORDED EventLedger events); offline Playwright source-control fixture PASS (4.1m, real temp git repo); unified_patch parser vitest 3 PASS; tsc + eslint clean

Monaco diff reuse closed: createConfiguredDiffEditor wired into SourceControlPanel via new unit-tested app/src/lib/source_control/unified_patch.ts (reconstructs original/modified sides from the unified patch)
adversarial review (4 blockers) forced executed-and-captured runtime proof; harden executed + captured the full real-PG/real-git/Playwright set
VALIDATION NOTE: the receipt PG test reads POSTGRES_TEST_URL (exported alongside DATABASE_URL); consistent with existing crate PG tests

wp_validator_review_v2.review_method: Integration Validator multi-agent workflow (wf_0ac25815-485 + wf_98386044-70a): independent per-MT reviewer + adversarial confirm on FAIL. No ACP. Governance/repo paperwork non-blocking per operator directive (2026-06-18). Bar = good code vs MT contract + WP packet + current Master Spec v02.194, plus the WP_VALIDATOR Spec-Realism Gate.
wp_validator_review_v2.summary: MT-253 source-control panel: PASS_V2. Real git CLI layer, real PG/EventLedger receipts, real Monaco diff, real offline Playwright proof of all named capabilities. No placeholders or forbidden deps.
findings: Core git layer real: source_control.rs implements all named capabilities via Command::new(git), run_git_bytes line 382.
Discard confirm enforced source_control.rs:217-219; Playwright negative test asserts button disabled and head commit unchanged (spec 254-257).
Real EventLedger receipts via KernelSourceControlEventRecorder (api/source_control.rs:70-112); event type registered kernel/mod.rs:284,368.

sub_rule_2 genuine: source_control_receipt_pg_tests.rs drives product recorder against real PostgreSQL, reads events back, asserts operations and durable KE- ids and commit in real git log; passed 113.84s.
Monaco diff reuse: MonacoDiffView uses createConfiguredDiffEditor (MT-247 seam) over unified_patch.ts; 3 vitest cases.
Offline Playwright drives built panel against real git + real PostgreSQL fixture, all 7 capabilities, zero external requests; passed 4.1m.
No placeholders/forbidden deps; boundary clean (zero .GOV); DEC-007 signed authorizes MT-253.

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger and/or offline Playwright where the contract names durable state or GUI behavior.
